ops.body: Surfaced 2026-07-13 during cc-context grep-guard review. The cc-notes @latest pin resolved to commit 42a5a3cca6d3 (the jj-aware detached-HEAD / notes.Client rework), whose plugin/hooks/comments.py:22 does 'from captain_hook.ast_grep import touched_comment_blocks' — a symbol absent from the published capt-hook wheel that 'uvx capt-hook' runs. Result: every consumer's 'uvx capt-hook test' shows '1 import errors' and the cc-notes comments hook can't load. This is the 'release captain-hook before consumers import new symbols' trap (see memory capt-hook-local-testing). Fix belongs to the cc-notes rework owner: release captain-hook with touched_comment_blocks first, THEN the cc-notes commit that imports it. Not a cc-context issue; cc-context tree carries no comments.py.
